creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
On Sun, 17 Jun 2012, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of dns/knot,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/169170 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169170
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org


Ai; I've submitted a maintainer-update with an incorrect address
(So by these I approve my own update).

-- 

Met vriendelijke groet,
With kind regards,


Leo Vandewoestijne.
